+## Status: IN PROGRESS - Pass 1 of 10
+
+## Missions
+1. Error Derive Parity: Replace one hand-written error `Display`/`Error` implementation with `thiserror::Error` where exact text and source semantics can be pinned.
+2. Enum String Helper: Collapse one enum `Display` match into a private/public `as_str` helper without changing serialized or displayed strings.
+3. JSON Shape Projection Helper: Extract one private JSON object or row projection helper while preserving key order and value types.
+4. Test Matrix Consolidation: Replace repeated enum/test assertions with table-driven checks that preserve every case.
+5. Constant Literal Audit: Consolidate repeated private literals in one bounded module without changing public output.
+6. Option/Default Narrowing: Simplify one repeated optional fallback path while preserving priority and absence handling.
+7. Local Error Constructor Helper: Collapse duplicated local error construction while preserving variants and messages.
+8. Assertion Macro/Helper Pass: DRY one test assertion cluster while preserving failure diagnostics and checked literals.
+9. Wrapper/Forwarder Census: Remove one private one-call wrapper or alias with no independent contract.
+10. Final Rescan and Dashboard: Re-scan changed surfaces and make one last Score >= 2.0 simplification or record convergence with evidence.
+
+## Completed Passes
+(none yet)

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Architecture Notes for Fourth Loop
+
+- `src/lib.rs` owns CLI dispatch, robot surfaces, and error envelopes.
+- `src/indexer/` and `src/storage/` are high-blast-radius and currently dirty, so this loop avoids them.
+- `src/analytics/` has isolated query/types tests and several private formatting/projection helpers.
+- `src/pages/`, `src/html_export/`, and `src/sources/` contain bounded pure helpers and test modules suitable for low-risk isomorphic simplification.
+- `tests/` contains broad integration coverage, but this loop prefers focused module or integration-test gates per pass.
